widget.name: Banglarbhumi Pro
widget.description: An advanced, high-utility automation and data-scraping tool specifically engineered for the West Bengal Land and Land Reforms (Banglarbhumi) portal. This application streamlines the 'Know Your Property' retrieval workflow by eliminating frequent, abrupt session timeouts through an intelligent background session-keepalive algorithm. It features integrated credential secure-storage for seamless single-click auto-fill during authentication and transforms raw ledger (Khatian) and plot details into professional, print-ready 'Searching Paper' reports embedded with localized plot maps.
widget.author: Your Name
